description: Bootstrap standalone workspace-agent-hub repository and publish the current session fabric

Reduce Manager composer explanatory prose and rely more on structural cues

Rename Manager bucket label from AI confirmation wait to user confirmation wait
Stop Manager auto-jumping to the newly sent topic after global send

Tighten Manager markdown reply spacing so list and paragraph gaps are easier to read
Replace Manager composer image button flow with drag-drop and clipboard image insertion at the text cursor

Separate Manager composer drafts from in-flight sent content so send clears immediately into a separate pending/sent area

Reassess the Manager send-preview pane and remove it if it does not help the primary send flow

Clarify Workspace Agent Hub Tailscale cross-PC access prerequisites and update docs
Remove Workspace Agent Hub server-side reconciliation interval by introducing authoritative session/transcript change events from the session bridge path
Manager composer: remove SEND label, remove Markdown note, and show send target next to or above the send button
Make Manager refresh latest state after screen lock or browser resume
Make Manager review worker results and perform commit/push/release chain when approved
Improve Manager recent-send lane persistence, deletion, collapse, and naming
Remove default always-on Manager GUI how-to copy for self-evident interactions and prepare global rule update

Add a favicon to the Workspace Agent Hub Manager GUI site

Split remaining workspace-agent-hub changes into appropriate commits and push them

Review worker change removing unnecessary composer-rail from Workspace Agent Hub manager
Review workspace-agent-hub CI failure / pre-commit alignment worker result and complete delivery chain if approved
Investigate why Manager can still show stale state after browser/tab resume and identify the root cause or instrumentation gap
Investigate whether Manager is incorrectly oscillating task state between AI working and queued for the CI/pre-commit alignment task and determine root cause

Fix the Manager self-rerun loop that still requeues the CI/pre-commit alignment task after manager review

Dogfood workspace-agent-hub and investigate any remaining bugs or operational problems
Fix remaining workspace-agent-hub bugs found in dogfood pass
Implement worker worktree isolation for Manager backend
Remove Manager current read work-item area and auto-collapse empty sections in workspace-agent-hub
Make manager routing reuse one continuing session across global sends and keep same-topic follow-ups in workspace-agent-hub
Harden workspace-agent-hub thread-meta atomic write against repeated Windows EPERM collisions
Prevent temporary Workspace Agent Hub unavailability during restart by hardening always-on/startup path and reducing restart downtime
Require Manager delivery chain to commit/push and release/publish when applicable before considering workspace-agent-hub tasks complete

Prevent temporary Workspace Agent Hub unavailability during restart by ensuring swap-based replacement keeps Web UI reachable

Harden workspace-agent-hub fault tolerance: startup integrity check, stale merge recovery, npm install on restart, pre-merge snapshot, queue crash safety, eager reconciliation, watchdog deep health check
